detail.description: George Valera lines out to left fielder Brice Matthews.

George Valera grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. George Valera out at 1st.

George Valera pops out to shortstop Carlos Correa.

George Valera grounds out, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd.

detail.description: George Valera doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. José Ramírez scores. Rhys Hoskins scores.
